subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou through Whose remembrance the near ones have soared in the atmosphere of the glory of Thy knowledge, and the sincere ones have ascended unto the seat [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من بذکرک طار المقربون فی هواء عز عرفانک و عرج المخلصون الی مقر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
